## of this document.

queries_tried: "Hackensack NJ" cannabis RFP OR "request for proposal"
"Hackensack" NJ cannabis license awarded OR approved

draft_emails.subject: Cannabis Retail RFP Inquiry — Hackensack
draft_emails.body:
Dear Municipal Clerk,

I hope this note finds you well. My name is [Your Name] and I represent a prospective cannabis retail applicant interested in Hackensack.

I am writing to inquire about the timeline and process for the upcoming cannabis retail license RFP. Specifically:

  1. When is the RFP expected to be released?
  2. Where will the RFP be posted (town website, state portal, etc.)?
  3. Who is the designated point of contact for application questions?

Any guidance you can provide would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Organization]
[Phone]

draft_emails.subject: Introduction — Cannabis Retail Applicant in Hackensack
draft_emails.body:
Dear Council Member,

I wanted to reach out and introduce myself. My name is [Your Name] and I represent a group exploring a cannabis retail application in Hackensack.

I appreciated Hackensack's thoughtful approach to 2021-14. We share the community's interest in a responsible, locally-rooted operation.

I would welcome the opportunity to connect briefly at your convenience — even a short call to understand the community's priorities would be invaluable.

Thank you for your public service.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Organization]
[Phone]

draft_emails.subject: Cannabis Retail Zoning Inquiry — Hackensack
draft_emails.body:
Dear Zoning Officer,

My name is [Your Name] and I am researching a potential cannabis retail application in Hackensack.

I understand that cannabis retail is permitted in (zones not yet confirmed). I have a few questions:

  1. Could you confirm which specific zones or overlay districts allow Class 5 retail?
  2. Is a zoning overlay map or GIS layer available that shows eligible parcels?
  3. Are there any pending zone amendments that might affect eligibility?

Any materials you can share would be very helpful as we evaluate sites.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Organization]
[Phone]

draft_emails.subject: Cannabis Retail Representation Inquiry — Hackensack
draft_emails.body:
Dear Counsel,

My name is [Your Name] and I represent a group preparing a cannabis retail license application in Hackensack.

I came across your firm's work before Hackensack's boards and wanted to reach out to gauge your interest and availability to represent an applicant in this process.

We are at an early stage and would value a brief introductory call to understand your approach and confirm capacity.

Please let me know if you are open to connecting.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Organization]
[Phone]
